prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I do not have access to real-time market data or predictive capabilities based on market-moving events. This prediction is generated using a statistical model based on the current price and historical volatility, not fundamental or technical analysis. The point estimate for 7 days is the current price ($245.17), as a neutral, unbiased estimate assuming a random walk for short-term price movements. The confidence intervals are calculated by projecting historical daily volatility over the 7-day period, assuming a normal distribution of returns. An assumed daily volatility of approximately 1.2% (leading to an annualized volatility of roughly 19%) for JNJ was used to calculate the ranges. Future actual prices may fall outside these intervals, and past performance is not indicative of future results. This is not financial advice.
